nodes.title: C: FINAL COMPOSITE (character over filled bg)

widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

groups.title: TIER 1 — GLASSES (trusted): detect, pose, face-mesh, BLUR. Sends: blurred video + mask metadata, face mesh, pose
TIER 2 PART A — MOBILE: extract Blurred Part. Sends to cloud: blurred part, face mesh, pose (3 only)
TIER 2 PART B-1 — MOBILE: remove person, FILL background (LaMa inpaint)
TIER 2 PART B-2 — CLOUD (untrusted): 3 inputs only; mask + black-hole bg derived from blurred part; FULL character generated
TIER 2 PART C — MOBILE: composite character over filled background = FINAL
EVALUATION ONLY: all-stages comparison (uses original for demo evaluation)

PERSON 1 (second detected person) - independent SAM2/pose/face/cloud-generate/composite; a SITARAPersonPresent node up by the shared detector + this lane's two ComfySwitchNodes skip SAM2 and the cloud pass automatically when absent
PERSON 2 (third detected person) - same pattern as PERSON 1, independently gated
Union of per-person masks (feeds whole-body blur + Step-1 LaMa background fill)
